authors: Sisanda Nkoala Trust Matsilele Musawenkosi Ndlovu Tanja Bosch a University of the Western Cape
raw_title: AI Hype Through an African Lens: A Critical Analysis of Language as Symbolic Action in Online News Publications
title_en: AI Hype Through an African Lens: A Critical Analysis of Language as Symbolic Action in Online News Publications
title_zh: 从非洲视角看人工智能炒作：在线新闻出版物中语言作为象征性行动的批判性分析
plain_summary_zh: 这篇研究从非洲的视角，批判性地分析了在线新闻中如何报道人工智能技术。研究者关注新闻语言如何塑造人们对AI的看法，特别是这些报道可能存在的夸张或偏见。
plain_summary_en: This research critically examines how artificial intelligence is reported in online news from an African perspective. It focuses on how news language shapes perceptions of AI, particularly looking at potential hype or bias in these reports.
research_direction_zh: 该研究属于媒体与传播研究领域，关注技术报道中的话语分析，特别是非西方视角下的媒体批判研究。
research_direction_en: This research falls within media and communication studies, focusing on discourse analysis in technology reporting, particularly critical media studies from non-Western perspectives.
